Problem Definition.definition: Clearly identifying the task the intelligent system must perform, including the goals, constraints, and success criteria.

Data Acquisition and Preparation.definition: Collecting relevant data and transforming it into a clean, structured format suitable for training machine learning models.

Model Development and Training.definition: Selecting appropriate algorithms and training models so they can learn patterns from the prepared data.

Model Evaluation and Refinement.definition: Assessing the model’s performance using validation techniques and improving it through tuning or additional data.

Deployment.definition: Integrating the trained model into a system or application so it can generate predictions or assist users.

Machine Learning Operations.definition: Monitoring, maintaining, and updating deployed models to ensure they continue performing effectively over time.
